div1.entryFree: Cankered, adjectively, == infected, polluted, evil: for this they have engrossed and piled up the c. heaps of strange-achieved gold, H4B IV, 5, 72. I will fight against my c. country, Cor. IV, 5, 97. Implying the idea of malignancy, == venomous, wicked: a c. grandam's will, John II, 194. this ingrate and c. Bolingbroke, H4A I, 3, 137. your c. hate, Rom. I, 1, 102.
